description_long: This is a light brown fedora hat with a wide, flat brim and a pinched crown. The surface of the hat has a subtle woven texture, giving it a slightly matte appearance. Around the base of the crown, there is a thin, matching hatband tied into a small, neat knot on one side. The crown is moderately tall and features a classic teardrop shape with a pronounced pinch at the front. The brim is uniform in width and extends outward, providing ample shade. The overall design is simple and elegant, suitable for both casual and semi-formal urban settings.
description: A light brown woven fedora hat with a wide, flat brim and a pinched teardrop crown, accented by a thin matching hatband tied at the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pinched crown, wide brim, and the hatband knot on the left side.
description_view_1: Left angled view highlighting the teardrop crown shape and the hatband knot more prominently.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back of the crown and the continuous brim with the hatband visible around the base.
description_view_3: Right angled view showing the crown's pinch and the hatband knot on the right side.
